features: ULTIMATE SHINE – Polishes your shoes for a sleek, smooth effect, restoring their appearance
EASY APPLICATION – This sponge-on product instantly buffs your footwear
TRAVEL-SIZED – Comes in a small, durable casing, making it a perfect on-the-go product
UK MANUFACTURING – British shoe care expertise since 1906
description: Product description Cherry Blossom Shine And Go Deluxe Accessories. Cherry Blossom Delux Shine Sponges Are A Must Have For Keeping Shoes Smart And Ready For And Situation. Never Be Caught Out With Dull Leathers Again. This Silicone Impregnated Sponge Gives That Immediate Shine And Buffed Finish. Super Quick And Easy To Use And Perfect For The Home, Work, Offices And Cars.. Neutral. Directions FOR USE ON: Black smooth leather, vinyl shoes and accessories. HOW TO USE: 1. Ensure that the item is clean, dry and dust free. 2. Wipe the sponge pad lightly over the surface to restore shine. Safety Warning Caution: keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Grangers International Ltd, S44 5FD, UK. See more
